changes: Today tab: floor-wide units, goal attainment, per-dept cards with PPH and progress bars
This Week tab: line chart (Units / Attainment % / PPH toggle), dept summary cards with trend vs Monday
Auto-folder: connect a shared OneDrive folder, dashboard scans every 60s for new dept exports
Dept payload accepted via file drop or paste
Stale indicator on dept cards older than 60 minutes
GitHub Pages deployment — suite now lives at a shared URL, no file sharing needed
index.html root redirect added so base URL forwards to Menu
README.md added to repo — full reference for files, transaction IDs, data rules, payload format
Attribution header added to all files — built by dean.karim
.gitignore added to block OS junk files and accidental export JSON commits
